ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-19-2023 Continued To Aug-21-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: James Mack Noble IV (pro per) appearing via zoom.

Discussion was held regarding the of filing the Inventory and Appraisal instead of emailing the examiner, also to address Charles Schwab account and Bank of America shares. Petition for final distribution on waiver of accounting is continued to August 21, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge; Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Mack Noble, IV, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms that no one is present to object to this petition. The court then queries Mr. Noble regarding whether he will have assistance administering the estate. Mr. Noble reports that he has resources in San Francisco to assist him and that he is licensed to practice law in Texas and has some experience administering estates there. The court then points Mr. Noble to his duties as administrator and specifically, not making any distributions of any kind without prior approval from the court. After additional discussion, Mr. Noble is advised that the Court intends to grant the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-06-2014 will be admitted to probate. James Mack Noble, IV will be appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Michael Kasolas will be appointed probate referee. Status on close of estate will be set for Nov-01-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
